summary: The user sought recommendations for Korean dishes to try at home, particularly bulgogi, after enjoying meals at Korean BBQ restaurants. They discussed incorporating gochujang into their bulgogi marinade and planned to host a dinner party featuring various Korean dishes, including appetizers and side dishes to complement the bulgogi.
facts: The user has eaten at three different Korean BBQ restaurants in their city and loved Hwang's bulgogi. The user has been experimenting with gochujang, a fermented soybean paste, in their recipes. The user is planning to host a dinner party soon and wants to serve a variety of Korean dishes. The user has been experimenting with different types of rice, including jasmine, basmati, and sushi rice. The user is considering serving a gochujang-based sauce on the side for guests to add to their bulgogi. The user is interested in serving Korean-style banchan (side dishes) alongside the bulgogi.
